title: Filters
description: Standard filter bar pattern. DS inputs without labels (no label variant from inputs.json), secondary Filtrar button, and two Carbon icon buttons: filter--add (orange) and filter--remove (red).
rules: Inputs: DS .inp class — no label, placeholder only. All inputs flex:1 so they share available width equally.
Filtrar: .btn.sec — secondary pill button. Default, Hover (bg N1), Active (border+text B6) states from DS CSS.
filter--add: 40×40px, border-radius:6px, border 1px var(--o5), icon fill var(--o5). Carbon filter--add icon.
filter--remove: 40×40px, border-radius:6px, border 1px var(--r6), icon fill var(--r6). Carbon filter--remove icon.
The filter bar fills the full card content width (card padding is 20px).
Inputs gain focus state (.foc class: blue border, B1 bg, focus ring) on click/tab — handled with onfocusin/onfocusout.
